titleStmt.title: SII 17.463: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 463. (A.R. No. 432 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
On palaeographical grounds the king may be identified with Rājarāja III.

This records the gift of 35 vēli of land, by Peruntiruvāṭṭi Kayilaikkiḻatti, a śāntikkūtti made free from taxes including antarāyam, kuḍimai, kōyiṟṟamappēṟu and nagaraviṉiyōgam by the Nagarattār of Rājēndraśiṅga-puram in the western division (Mēlaivagai) of Umbaḷa-nāḍu, for various offerings including damanaka flowers during the spring festival to god Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2vatu Umpaḷanāṭṭu melaivakai rā[je]ntiraciṅkapurattu nakarattom Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkku cittirai vacantattukkum tiruttamaṉakappaṭikkum Āṭi Aruḷavum Amutu ceytaruḷavum Aruḷavum veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku nāḷ ṟa palaceytu māṭiyaruḷavum brā tevatāṉam kaṭamai ṇṭu tāṉaṭikkut teṟku Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāy pūcalāṅkuṭaiyāṉ tirumaṟaikkāṭṭuṭaiyāṉ citaraṉ perilum Āṉaivāyiluṭaiyāṉ
Āḷavantāṉ śrī perilum nāmattuvilai Eḻuti Eṅkaḷūr cāntik kūttikaḷil ci rt temāṅkuṭip peruntiruvāṭṭi kayilaikkiḻattikku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟa nūṇūrāṉa rācarācapurattut toṇṭi Ellaikku meṟkku Umpaḷa peruvaḻikku vaṭakku Eṅkaḷ Ūr kāṇiyāṉa mpantaṭṭam mukkaikku kiḻakku kaṭal maṇṭu te Ellaikku teṟku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam muppattay veliyum Ivaḷ Innāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nirvārttu Ivaḷ Eṅkaḷ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa cātaṉamum kuṭuttamaiyil Innilattāl vanta maṭakku
māvinta kaṭamai kuṭimai ni ṭa Itta kaḷ Eṅkaḷ Ūrile Eṟṟi Iṟukka kaṭavo mākavum Antarāyam kuṭimai koyiṟṟamappeṟu nakaraviṉiyokam Uḷḷiṭṭu varuvaṉavum Innilattukku taṇṭātoḻiyak kaṭavatākavum Innilattukkut teṟku nokki poṉa kiḷai tāṅki Ālam karaiyum nikki nikki niṉṟa nilam cellakkaṭava ceytu kalveṭṭi rācentiraciṅkapurattu nakarattom .
Digital edition of SII 17.463 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
